svg.title: CoWoS cross-section with color-matched supplier cards
svg.desc: A grid of supplier company cards color-matched to the layers of a CoWoS cross-section: teal ABF substrate makers, coral Ajinomoto build-up film, purple Nitto Boseki T-glass cloth, and amber Union Tool and Topoint micro drill bits. A dashed boundary marks assembly by TSMC, with a footnote noting overflow outsourced to ASE, PTI, and Amkor.

g.text: * Overflow assembly outsourced to ASE / PTI / Amkor (OSATs)
